Title: A fijivirus capsid protein hijacks autophagy degrading an x-3 fatty acid desaturase to suppress jasmonate-mediated antiviral defence

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Class: Polyunsaturated fatty acid; fatty acid-derived oxylipin hormone
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Detected during RBSDV infection; used in transient expression assays
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Yeast two-hybrid; co-immunoprecipitation; BiFC; GST pull-down; transient expression-mediated degradation assays; autophagy inhibitor assays
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Directly interacts with OsFAD7 and promotes its ATG8-dependent autophagic degradation, lowering C18:3 and suppressing JA-mediated antiviral defence
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Promotes viral infection and host susceptibility
Common_Genes.Applied_Promoters: CaMV35S constitutive promoter in transient expression assays
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Contains distinct interaction capacities for OsFAD7 and OsATG8; also a viral accumulation readout in infection assays
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. P10 directly binds OsFAD7 on chloroplasts. 2. P10 enhances autophagy and promotes OsATG8-mediated degradation of OsFAD7. 3. This suppresses C18:3 and JA-mediated antiviral defence in rice.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful target for disrupting virus virulence mechanisms, for example by blocking P10-OsFAD7 or P10-ATG8 interactions

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Class: Polyunsaturated fatty acid; fatty acid-derived oxylipin hormone
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: BiFC; GST pull-down; transient co-expression degradation assay
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Also directly interacts with OsFAD7 and promotes its degradation, suggesting a conserved fijivirus strategy
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Supplementary validation extending the mechanism from RBSDV to SRBSDV
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. SP10 physically interacts with OsFAD7. 2. SP10 promotes concentration-dependent degradation of OsFAD7. 3. The OsFAD7-targeting mechanism may be conserved across fijiviruses.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Supports broad-spectrum resistance strategies targeting conserved fijivirus capsid protein interference with OsFAD7

Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Plastidial omega-3 fatty acid desaturase; N-terminal REDOX domain and C-terminal desaturase domain
Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Unsaturated fatty acid biosynthesis linked to jasmonic acid biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Chloroplast C18:3-producing step feeding the octadecanoid/JA pathway
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Desaturates C18:2 to produce C18:3 in chloroplast membranes
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Key control step for C18:3 supply to JA biosynthesis in this study
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Antiviral defence against rice black-streaked dwarf virus
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Highly expressed in roots, stems and especially leaves during the vegetative stage
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Highly expressed in roots, stems and especially leaves during the vegetative stage
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: RBSDV infection; MeJA treatment; DIECA treatment; exogenous C18:3 treatment
Pathway_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: RBSDV P10; OsATG8a; OsATG8b; OsATG8c; OsATG8d; SRBSDV SP10
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: CRISPR/Cas9 knockout; overexpression; LC-MS metabolite profiling; yeast two-hybrid; co-immunoprecipitation; BiFC; GST pull-down; protein degradation assay; inhibitor assay with E64d/MG132
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes C18:3 accumulation, increases OPDA/JA/JA-Ile levels, and enhances resistance to RBSDV; loss of function has the opposite effect
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Overexpression increases sensitivity to MeJA and stronger shoot/root growth inhibition under JA treatment
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Promising target for breeding or engineering RBSDV-resistant rice by enhancing C18:3 and JA biosynthesis, but deployment should consider growth effects associated with elevated JA sensitivity and vulnerability to viral P10-mediated autophagic degradation
Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: CaMV35S constitutive promoter (for transient GFP-OsFAD7 expression in N. benthamiana); overexpression promoter in transgenic rice not clearly specified
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Targeted fatty acid metabolomics by UHPLC-MS/MS; JA/JA-Ile/OPDA LC-MS/MS
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: OsFAD7 contains two predicted AIM motifs; AIM1 (ESWQPL, 226-231) is required for interaction with OsATG8 proteins and for P10/ATG8-mediated degradation, whereas AIM2 is dispensable. P10 does not alter OsFAD7 localization but reduces protein stability.
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsFAD7 is the major rice plastid omega-3 desaturase associated with C18:3 production. 2. RBSDV P10 directly binds OsFAD7 and promotes its autophagic degradation via ATG8-dependent recognition. 3. OsFAD7 overexpression elevates C18:3, OPDA, JA and JA-Ile and enhances antiviral resistance, whereas knockout reduces these metabolites and resistance. 4. OsFAD7-mediated resistance requires an active JA pathway, as chemical inhibition or OsCOI1a silencing attenuates the effect.

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Unsaturated fatty acid biosynthesis linked to jasmonic acid biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Likely desaturates C18:2 to produce C18:3
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Not established; reported as weakly expressed and likely minor compared with OsFAD7
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Barely expressed during all growth stages of rice
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Barely expressed during all growth stages of rice
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Expression profile database analysis; promoter-GUS assay
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Likely minor contribution to rice C18:3 production under studied conditions
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Lower priority target than OsFAD7 for engineering C18:3/JA-related resistance in rice
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Included as a contrasted desaturase but not functionally validated as a main experimental target in results
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsFAD8 is a plastid omega-3 desaturase homolog in rice. 2. Its expression is very low across growth stages in this study. 3. The paper infers OsFAD7, not OsFAD8, is the dominant enzyme for C18:3 production in rice.

Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Selective autophagic degradation of OsFAD7, thereby controlling precursor supply for jasmonate biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: RBSDV infection; viral capsid protein P10
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Functions within the autophagy machinery; P10 enhances OsATG8b-mediated degradation of OsFAD7
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Overexpression in transgenic rice; BiFC; yeast two-hybrid with OsFAD7; protein degradation assay in N. benthamiana; complementation in NbATG8e1-silenced plants; confocal monitoring of GFP-ATG8 puncta
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes OsFAD7 degradation and thereby is associated with reduced C18:3/JA-mediated defence when hijacked by P10
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Condition-dependent controller enabling viral suppression of JA precursor supply through autophagy
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Used as GFP-OsATG8b overexpression marker line for autophagy in rice roots
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Enhanced degradation of OsFAD7 may compromise antiviral defence when co-opted by virus
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: OsATG8b fully restored P10-mediated OsFAD7 degradation in NbATG8e1-silenced N. benthamiana, supporting functional conservation
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsATG8b interacts with OsFAD7 and promotes its degradation in a dose-dependent manner. 2. P10 enhances OsATG8b-mediated degradation of OsFAD7. 3. This process depends on OsFAD7 AIM1 and contributes to suppression of JA-mediated antiviral defence.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Engineering strategies that weaken pathogen-triggered ATG8-dependent turnover of OsFAD7, without globally disabling autophagy, may help preserve JA-mediated antiviral resistance

Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: F-box JA receptor of SCFCOI1 complex
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: JA signaling downstream of JA biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Hormone perception enabling JA-responsive transcriptional defence outputs
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: JA signaling pathway; JA-responsive genes OsPR1a, OsPR5, OsPR10
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Positively required for activation of JA-responsive defence genes
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RNA interference knockdown in ZH11 and OsFAD7-overexpression background; RBSDV infection assays; MeJA sensitivity assays; qRT-PCR of JA-responsive genes
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Required for OsFAD7-conferred antiviral resistance; silencing OsCOI1a attenuates resistance and JA responses despite OsFAD7 overexpression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Essential downstream signaling gate for converting increased JA production into antiviral defence
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Knockdown reduces JA sensitivity and antiviral defence
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Used genetically to show that OsFAD7-mediated resistance depends on an active JA pathway rather than only increased C18:3 production
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsCOI1a knockdown increases RBSDV susceptibility. 2. Silencing OsCOI1a weakens the antiviral resistance conferred by OsFAD7 overexpression. 3. OsCOI1a is required for full JA-responsive growth inhibition and defence gene induction in this system.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Maintain or enhance COI1-mediated JA perception when deploying OsFAD7-based antiviral resistance strategies
